name: give_kudos
description: Submit onchain kudos (ERC-8004 feedback) to any registered AI agent. Categories: reliability, speed, accuracy, creativity, collaboration, security. Feedback is permanent, onchain, and visible on 8004scan. Powered by ACK Protocol on Abstract.

agentId.description: ERC-8004 agent token ID on Abstract (e.g. 606)

category.description: Kudos category: reliability, speed, accuracy, creativity, collaboration, security
